meta.name: Ari Meetings — Marginalia
meta.stressTested: 2026-07-16 — six-persona panel, 6/6 resonates; conditions folded into v1.1.0 (secondary ink AA fix, mark roles locked, R3 retired, texture dropped, voice tightened)
meta.note: Repo-root DESIGN.md/DESIGN.json are the load-bearing test fixtures for the outgoing (frozen) Tauri app. As of 2026-07-16 the Tauri app was rebranded to Marginalia, so DESIGN.* now describe Marginalia as applied to the Tauri app, kept in lockstep with frontend/src/app/globals.css and derived from these tokens. This file remains canonical.

colorRoles.inkHeading: Headings/display text only — the second ink (Iron Gall in light; ink-washed paper white in dark). Non-interactive; never signals state; outside the accent budget.
colorRoles.inkSecondary: Supporting text only; AA-compliant at any size (5.3:1 light / 6.4:1 dark). Never the only copy of critical information.
colorRoles.accent: Shin-kai — the sole interactive ink: selection, citations, links, speaker names only.
colorRoles.selectionWash: Light-mode alpha 0.11 is a tune-in-build value — test 0.16-0.18 in the real app on a bright display before locking.
colorRoles.recordingRed: Live capture only; never co-branded with accent; always labeled.
colorRoles.success: Always paired with a text or icon label.

heading.name: Bricolage Grotesque
heading.licensing: SIL OFL — bundled .ttf, self-hosted in the app bundle; Font.custom("Bricolage Grotesque", size:) (verify PostScript names from shipped file)

body.name: SF Pro
body.role: all body, controls, labels, metadata; SF Pro Semibold for headings below 17pt

mono.name: SF Mono
mono.role: timecodes, model identifiers, technical values; tabular numerals

editorialRamp.figure: paper field + hairline border; real product states only

motion.policy: product UI: state-driven only; respect Reduce Motion (pulses become static, transitions become fades)

drawOnMark.use: the sanctioned signature move: the gesture writes itself — launch film and website hero

marketing.rules: composed motion allowed on marketing surfaces if calm and ink-like; no parallax, no springs, nothing loops forever; one orchestrated moment per page; Reduce Motion honored

ogImage.spec: espresso or porcelain field; Bricolage headline in that field's heading ink; flick or wordmark in a corner; 72px (6%) margins

socialAvatar.spec: app-icon squircle composition; for circular crops center the mark at ~55% of the paper field

favicon.spec: simplified 32px icon cut on the paper field; 180 (apple-touch) may use the full icon cut

socialBanner.spec: poster-template derived; type inside the safe center 1200px

square.spec: poster template recomposed; headline <= 3 lines; wordmark bottom-left

emailHeader.spec: wordmark on paper field exported AS AN IMAGE — email clients strip web fonts; live email text uses the system-stack fallback

rules.accentSolidFill: reserved for THE primary action — one per view/viewport; all other accent use is stroke, text, or wash

productOnly: animate only real state (marketing may use calm, ink-like composed motion)
<=8% accent budget (marketing: accent = interaction + citation, one primary CTA per viewport)

roles.menuBarAndRecordingGlyph: assets/mark-16.svg (the signature flick — owned role; animates from real audio level while recording)
roles.appIcon: the R2 mark, icon-weight cut (assets/app-icon.svg): macOS squircle (22.37% corner radius); porcelain field #FAF8F5 + Iron Gall #152C66 ink in light, espresso field #211E1B + paper-white #EDE8E1 ink in dark; gesture spans ~60% of field; <=32px switches to the simplified heavier cut (single-weight a, run-out shortened to first upturn)

marks.colorRule: single color per instance via currentColor: accent, ink, or paper white on dark
marks.smallCutRule: below 32px rendered height use mark-16 (the signature flick); it doubles as the recording-state glyph
marks.superseded: R3 Ledger Hand (assets/mark-fallback-ledger.svg) is retired from the live system — design history only; do not ship
